channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: Countries airlift nationals evacuated from from virus-hit cruise ship
item.description: Spanish passengers are the first to leave the MV Hondius, after an outbreak saw three people die and several infected.

item.title: Braintrust AWS Data Breach Prompts Urgent API Key Rotation for AI Platform Customers - Rescana
item.description: Braintrust AWS Data Breach Prompts Urgent API Key Rotation for AI Platform Customers Rescana

item.title: Supply Chain Attack: Fake OpenAI Repository on Hugging Face Distributes Infostealer Malware Targeting Developers and AI Tools - Rescana
item.description: Supply Chain Attack: Fake OpenAI Repository on Hugging Face Distributes Infostealer Malware Targeting Developers and AI Tools Rescana

item.title: Trump's Latest 10% Tariffs Declared Unlawful by US Trade
item.description: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed. Crooked Media’s Straight Scrutiny Co-host and author of The U.S. Constitution: A Comprehensive and Annotated Guide for the Modern Reader Melissa Murray joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on B

item.title: 'Covid-Era Measures': After PM's Appeal, Is Work From Home Set To Return To India's Workplaces?
item.description: PM Modi said 'Covid-era practices' like working from home and online conferences must resume as the world reels from the economic impact of the US-Iran war.

item.title: Food inflation hammers households in war-hit Iran
item.description: Iranians faced with skyrocketing food prices as inflation soars, currency plunges amid US-enforced naval blockade.

item.title: Ivanti Warns of New EPMM Flaw Exploited in Zero-Day Attacks - Security Boulevard
item.description: Ivanti Warns of New EPMM Flaw Exploited in Zero-Day Attacks Security Boulevard

item.title: Australia Warns of ClickFix Attacks Pushing Vidar Stealer Malware - Security Boulevard
item.description: Australia Warns of ClickFix Attacks Pushing Vidar Stealer Malware Security Boulevard

item.title: New TCLBanker Malware Self-Spreads Over WhatsApp and Outlook - Security Boulevard
item.description: New TCLBanker Malware Self-Spreads Over WhatsApp and Outlook Security Boulevard

item.title: The Ultimate Guide to Travel Insurance for Complex Times
item.description: We’re just weeks away from summer vacation, where families will be traveling across the country and around the world. That doesn’t even take into account Europe’s vacation month in August. Between the Iran-Lebanon war, possible fuel shortages, and ballooning flight costs – there are a lot of questions about upcoming travel. So is travel insurance worth it? Bloomberg Pursuits' Sara Clemence joins David Gura and Christ

item.title: Solicitor General launches two tomes on humour in court
item.description: The CJI says the books are replete with hilarious anecdotes and incidents Tushar Mehta has collected after raiding law libraries, sifting through old case files and digging out obscure trial records

item.title: Karnataka is No 1 in revenue, panchayat services, claims Priyank Kharge
item.description: The Minister was launching a large-scale distribution drive for revenue department benefits at Dr. S.M. Pandit Rangamandir in Kalaburagi

item.title: From flight journey to land gifts, SSC toppers receive unique rewards in A.P.
item.description: In a heartwarming gesture from Vizianagaram district, A. Hemanth, a student of ZPHS at Cheepurupalli, who secured 581 marks in the SSC examinations, was given his first-ever flight journey experience from Visakhapatnam to Vijayawada

item.title: Why Parenting Now Feels Like an Investment Strategy
item.description: In an age of hustle culture and hyperoptimization, parenting has become a source of pressure. Author of “Overinvested: The Emotional Economy of Modern Parenting” Nina Bandelj joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the shift in modern-day parenting practices. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Olszewski" "Not Confident" the US Can Negotiate an Advantageous Deal with Iran
item.description: Rep. Johnny Olszewski joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the recent news that Iran has submitted a response to a U.S. proposal via Pakistan and expressed concern over the lack of transparency and consultation with Congress, noting that the administration has provided no real-time updates or public hearings on the conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Kochi Port on alert after hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship
item.description: The outbreak was reported on the expedition cruise ship MV Hondius, where three deaths have been reported

item.title: Top Semiconductor Stocks to Watch in May 2026: AI Chip Rally Analysis - Intellectia AI
item.description: Top Semiconductor Stocks to Watch in May 2026: AI Chip Rally Analysis Intellectia AI

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Lime’s IPO gamble
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: Putin hints at ending Russia’s war in Ukraine, but why now?
item.description: Amid a US-backed ceasefire, Putin signals peace talks could progress, but broader negotiations remain stalled.

item.title: PM Modi congratulates TVK's Vijay on taking oath as Tamil Nadu CM after win in assembly elections 2026
item.description: Prime Minister Modi reportedly congratulated Tamil Nadu's new Chief Minister Vijay during a phone call. Former West Bengal CM Mamata Banerjee also expressed her wishes, emphasising the election's reflection of the people's aspirations and confidence in Vijay's leadership.

item.title: Trump, Xi Set to Meet for High-Stakes Meeting in Beijing
item.description: President Donald Trump said he’s looking forward to meeting Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping, signaling his plans for the high-stakes summit are still on despite fresh tensions between the world’s largest economies. Former Assistant Secretary of State for East Asia Danny Russel joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Refrain from foreign travel, buying gold for a year: PM Modi’s appeal amid West Asia crisis
'Buy Indian, Choose Domestic Tourism': PM Modi Urges Citizens As Iran War Disrupts Global Economy
item.description: PM Modi suggested restarting 'Covid-era practices', such as working from home, while urging citizens to reduce edible oil consumption and opt for domestic tourism.

item.title: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security - News On AIR
item.description: HM Amit Shah says, BJP govt in West Bengal will secure India’s borders & plug biggest hole in national security News On AIR

item.title: Netanyahu warns Iran ‘not over’ until uranium stockpile is taken out, refuses to give timeline for ending conflict
item.description: International nuclear monitors estimate that Iran still possesses roughly 970 pounds of nearly bomb-grade uranium, raising ongoing concerns among Western and Israeli officials over Tehran’s nuclear ambitions.

item.title: Iran sends response to US ceasefire proposal via Pakistan
item.description: Tehran has been saying negotiations should focus on ending hostilities, securing guarantees against future attacks.

item.title: ‘Use petrol, gas, diesel with restraint, work from home, don't purchase gold’: Modi amid fuel crisis due to US-Iran war
item.description: Modi says such restraint would conserve foreign exchange and mitigate the economic shocks caused by international conflict

item.title: Spice Company Wins Suit Over 10% Trump Global Tariffs
item.description: President Donald Trump’s 10% global tariffs were declared unlawful by a federal trade court in a fresh blow to the administration’s economic agenda, just months after the US Supreme Court vacated earlier levies he’d imposed. Burlap and Barrel is a small spice importer and it's one of the plaintiffs that sued to get this result. Co-founders and Co-CEOs, Ethan Frisch and Ori Zohar and Liberty Justice Center Chairman &

item.title: Pimco CIO Sees Risk of Fed Hiking Rates Due to Iran War, FT Says
item.description: The war in Iran may lead the Federal Reserve to further delay interest-rate cuts and instead raise rates, Pimco Chief Investment Officer Dan Ivascyn told the Financial Times.

item.title: US F-35 changes course to UAE after mid-air emergency over Gulf of Oman amid Iran war: Report
item.description: An F-35 Lightning II from the US Air Force reportedly declared an in-flight emergency over the Strait of Hormuz, transmitting squawk code 7700. The aircraft altered its course toward the UAE after losing its transponder signal as per the flight tracking data. The cause remains unknown.

item.title: Police probe threat call after gelatin sticks found near PM’s Bengaluru route
item.description: According to police, the unidentified caller warned that explosions would take place near Hindustan Aeronautics Limited Airport and the Art of Living Ashram

item.title: 'PM seems to have memory loss': Congress reminds Modi of 50-day delay in Delhi CM pick amid Kerala leadership suspense
item.description: Congress leader Ramesh Chennithala criticized Prime Minister Modi for his remarks on the Kerala CM selection delay, pointing out the BJP's own 50-day wait in Delhi. He emphasized the Congress's democratic process versus the BJP's 'authoritarian' approach. Consultations are ongoing, with a decision expected soon after discussions with leaders and MLAs.

item.title: Australia's right-wing One Nation party scores historic parliamentary win
item.description: One Nation gains its first seat in the lower house, in a by-election seen as a key test for the populist party.

item.title: Dissent Grips Mamata Banerjee's Trinamool As Bengal Election Fallout Exposes Cracks Within
item.description: Several party leaders have publicly spoken out against Mamata and Abhishek's Banerjee's leadership of the party, after the TMC suffered a massive defeat against the BJP in Bengal.

item.title: Gelatin sticks found along PM Modi’s convoy, half hour before he passed by
item.description: Police have also detained a suspect who made a call to the police control room at around 7:30 a.m. threatening to trigger explosions near HAL Airport and the Art of Living premises during the Prime Minister’s visit.

item.title: FMCG companies bracing for another round of price increases amid inflation
item.description: While the companies have already hiked prices by 3%-5%, executives indicate further increase citing inflationary pressure arising from volatile crude oil prices, higher logistics costs, currency depreciation, and disruptions in global supply chains amid geopolitical tensions

item.title: DW News. . Around the world, governments are moving to block prediction‑market platforms, calling them illegal and addictive gambling. The pushback comes as people bet real money on wars, elections and other global events - with these markets exploding - facebook.com
item.description: DW News. . Around the world, governments are moving to block prediction‑market platforms, calling them illegal and addictive gambling. The pushback comes as people bet real money on wars, elections and other global events - with these markets exploding facebook.com

item.title: PM Modi assures more support to Telangana, asks CM Revanth to collaborate with him
item.description: PM Narendra Modi inaugurates or lays foundation stone for Zaheerabad Industrial Park (National Investment and Manufacuting Zone), IOC terminal at Malkapur, multi-tracking of railway line between Kazipet and Vijayawada and PM Mitra Park in Warangal

item.title: Iran sends response to US proposals to end war
item.description: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

item.title: Iran warns against complying with US blockade as Gulf attacks reported - BBC
item.description: Iran warns against complying with US blockade as Gulf attacks reported BBC
